subcodes.first_line: The Divine Lamp, amidst the winds of existence and gazing upon divine destiny and decree, cannot be hindered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مصباح الهی ما بین اریاح شهود و ناظرات بقضاء و قدر الهی لا تمنعه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
